CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.blbId: The identifier of the associated LoadBalancer
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.clientToken: Idempotency token, no more than 64 characters
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.listenerPort: Listening port of the listener, must be an integer between 1 and 65535
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.scheduler: Load balancing algorithm, supports two modes: "RoundRobin" (weighted round robin) / "LeastConnection" (least connections)
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.keepSession: Whether to enable session persistence, which routes requests from the same client to the same backend server; disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionType: Cookie handling method for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled; supports "insert" / "rewrite", defaults to "insert"
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionTimeout: Cookie expiration time for session persistence (in seconds), valid only when session persistence is enabled; defaults to 3600s, must be an integer between 1 and 15552000
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.keepSessionCookieName: Cookie name to be overwritten for session persistence, valid only when session persistence is enabled and keepSessionType is "rewrite"
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.xForwardedFor: Whether to enable retrieval of the real client IP; when enabled, backend servers can obtain the client's real address via the X-Forwarded-For HTTP header; disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.xForwardedProto: Whether to enable retrieval of the listening protocol; when enabled, backend servers can obtain the listening protocol via the X-Forwarded-Proto HTTP header; disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.additionalAttributes: Custom configuration for HTTPS type listeners
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.additionalAttributes.gzipJson: Whether to enable gzip JSON compression; string type, value is "on" or "off"
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.serverTimeout: Maximum timeout for backend servers (in seconds); defaults to 30s, must be an integer between 1 and 3600
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.certIds: Certificate chain to be loaded by the listener; currently only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.encryptionType: Encryption option, defaults to tls_cipher_policy_default; supports: tls_cipher_policy_default / tls_cipher_policy_1_1 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2 / tls_cipher_policy_1_2_secure / userDefind; refer to [encryption](blb/API参考/附录.md#encryption) for corresponding encryption protocols and cipher suites
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.encryptionProtocols: When encryptionType is userDefind, a list of protocol types composed of combinations of "tlsv10", "tlsv11", and "tlsv12"
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.appliedCiphers: Cipher suites, see [encryption](blb/API参考/附录.md#encryption); multiple cipher suites are separated by a colon ":"
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.dualAuth: Whether to enable mutual (two-way) authentication; disabled by default
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.clientCertIds: When dualAuth is true, the client certificate chain to be loaded; currently only one certificate ID is allowed; if multiple are provided, only the last one takes effect
CreateAppBlbHttpsListener.additionalCertDomains.Host: Certificate domain name; wildcard domains and their subdomains are also supported if the certificate product type is a wildcard domain
